  "findings": [
    "Inadequate bracing and kickers to withstand lateral concrete pour pressure",
    "Risk of formwork blowout, structural failure, or severe alignment deflection during concrete placement"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop the pour preparation and suspend any active concrete placement in the affected zone",
    "Install additional engineered bracing, kickers, and strongbacks to meet lateral pressure requirements",
    "Verify formwork design and bracing configuration against engineered drawings and ACI 347 guidelines before resuming"
  ],
  "rationale": "The formwork bracing is inadequate to resist the calculated lateral pressures of the concrete pour. Proceeding with the pour under these conditions poses a high risk of catastrophic formwork blowout, which threatens worker safety and structural integrity.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 347 (Guide to Formwork for Concrete)"
  ]
}
